headline: KeyBank Provides $56 Million of Financing for Affordable Senior Housing in Ohio
summary: CLEVELAND, OH / ACCESS Newswire / June 30, 2026 / KeyBank Community Development Lending and Investment (CDLI) provided a $16.5MM taxable construction loan, a $9.4MM federal LIHTC equity investment, and a $8.2MM state LIHTC investment on behalf of ...
